name: eyay-toolkits
description: Personal Claude Code plugins. Built for shipping systems, not essays. If it helps you, steal it.

plugins.name: prose-engineers
plugins.description: Write technical documentation, articles, reviews, and postmortems in a storytelling style that's direct, humble, and problem-first.

plugins.name: evm-decimal-validation
plugins.description: Validate and configure token decimals for EVM-compatible blockchain deployments to prevent amount calculation errors.

plugins.name: ts-backend-dev
plugins.description: TypeScript backend development: database performance optimization, code review, and Prisma schema design.

plugins.name: career-tools
plugins.description: Build tailored cover letters and ATS-friendly CVs by scanning a repo for background info and matching to job postings.

plugins.name: solana-onchain
plugins.description: Solana blockchain integration: query accounts, analyze transactions, execute operations with mainnet safety safeguards.

plugins.name: sui-dev-tools
plugins.description: Sui blockchain development: Move smart contracts, TypeScript SDK, frontend dApp Kit, Seal secrets, and Walrus storage.

plugins.name: visual-gen
plugins.description: Generate blog cover images, architecture diagrams, and process infographics as PNG using HTML+CSS rendered via Chrome headless.

plugins.name: bmad-sprint-run
plugins.description: Autonomous sprint orchestration for BMad-driven development pipelines. Drives Claude Code through create-story, dev-story, quality gates, and code-review without human intervention.

plugins.name: block-forbidden-git-add
plugins.description: PreToolUse hook that denies git commands staging protected paths, whole-tree adds, or rewriting history.

plugins.name: perihbahasa
plugins.description: Generate humorous, absurd, and flirty Indonesian proverb (peribahasa) remixes with precise rhyme and cadence.
